summary: Ad Performance Report feature testing completed successfully. All 9 requested features verified and working. Fixed backend bug with dimension parameter parsing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed backend bug: POST /reports/ad-performance endpoint was using List[str] for dimensions parameter which didn't parse comma-separated strings correctly. Changed to str type with manual parsing (same as CSV/Excel export endpoints).
seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses mock data for demonstration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad Performance Report feature fully implemented and tested. Report uses MOCK DATA for demonstration (as per requirements). All dimension checkboxes, metrics sections, and export functionality working correctly.

elements: Date Range picker with Start/End dates

dimension_checkboxes.note: All 5 dimension checkboxes visible and toggleable

video_metrics_section.note: All 5 video metrics shown with 'Included' badges

generate_report_button.behavior: Creates report with summary cards and data table, switches to Preview tab

export_csv_button.note: Downloads CSV file with all dimensions and metrics

export_excel_button.note: Downloads XLSX file with colored headers

mocked_apis_list: Ad Performance Report data generation uses random mock data (as per requirements)
mocked_apis.note: MOCK DATA badge displayed prominently in UI
